strategy_summary: The eyes of crocodiles are protected while still enabling vision underwater thanks to deployable transparent membranes. “The tough, transparent nictitans allows submerged vision.” (Fowler and Miller 2003:60)
mechanism:
The eyes of crocodiles are protected while still enabling vision underwater thanks to deployable transparent membranes.

“The tough, transparent nictitans allows submerged vision.” (Fowler and Miller 2003:60)
